features: Wide Compatibility: 14 inch 16:9 Privacy Screen Filter fit for Dimensions - Width:311mm/12.2inch, Height: 175mm/6.89 inch, Diagonal: 14". Privacy screen protector is compatible with HP, Lenovo, Dell, Acer, Asus, Sony,Samsung, Envy, Toshiba and other brands of 14" (16:9) laptops. For detailed measurement instructions, please refer to the 2nd product image,or contact us if you have any questions about the Privacy Screen Filter.

Improved Privacy Filter: With unique ultra-fine micro louvers technology, our laptop privacy screen limits the viewing angle to about 28 degrees on each side. Micro louvers are angled to block part of the pixels on your screen, the allowed pixels can only be frontal This prevents people nearby from seeing your monitor, ensuring that the privacy of your computer data is not disturbed.

Easy to Install & Detachable: Effortless installation with a magic magnetism feature - just align, tap, and protect your screen from prying eyes. The automatic snap-on magnetic attachment ensures a secure fit without any damage to your laptop's screen. The snap design allows for easy on-and-off, and the included storage clip makes it convenient for on-the-go protection. Say goodbye to adhesive residue and hello to a clear, secure, and flexible privacy solution for your laptop!

Multi Function & Privacy Protected：Features with a general computer screen protector such as screen protection, anti-glare, anti-scratch, high transparent. This magnetic screen privacy filter is the ideal solution for for open office settings, universities, financial institutions, and corporate travel!

Anti-Blue Light & Anti-Glare Eye Protection：Anti-reflective surface for enhanced viewing comfort, protect your privacy and your eyes with the desktop security screen that reduces blue light exposure to minimize UV radiation up to 96% UV and reducing blue light by 70%.
